reviews.comment:
Bastante caras las habitaciones para los Socios. ya que solo paras unas horas para dormir y seguir viaje. deberian bajar un poco el precio.

(Translated by Google)
The rooms for members are quite expensive, since you only stop for a few hours to sleep and continue your journey. They should lower the price a bit.
